interpretation: The 100% holdout/noisy score is a semantic policy bridge result, not evidence of the continuous time, stateful, neuromodulated and edge-of-chaos dynamics described in Qubic's NIA articles. Treat it as an oracle-coverage warning and require temporal dynamics evidence before claiming Neuraxon generalization.

semantic_policy_coverage.warning: semantic_policy_oracle_coverage_high: final observations are directly decidable by the explicit policy bridge, so perfect accuracy is not evidence of continuous-time Neuraxon dynamics.

temporal_dynamics.interpretation: Temporal probe inspired by NIA Vol. 1/2/3/5/7: final observations hide explicit action cues, so success must come from temporal/stateful Neuraxon evidence such as continuous time, state carry-over, trinary buffering and modulation-like dynamics.
